rationale: The cited paper appears only in a methodological literature-list citation in a footnote (paired with another paper) as an example of recent work on identifying treatment effects in social settings. The citing paper does not discuss Narayanan and Nair's installed-base bias problem, bias-correction estimator, or IV strategy in its theory, identification, estimation, or robustness sections. Its empirical design relies on a different quasi-experimental seat-visibility setup rather than building on that specific framework. So the citation functions as broad background context rather than a meaningful building block.
